events.reasoning: Game over. Proceeding past defeat screen.
Starting WATCHER A0
Talk to Neow to get starting bonus

Neow options evaluation:
1. Upgrade a Card - Solid but modest. Eruption+ or Vigilance+ would be nice.
2. Neow's Lament (3 fights at 1 HP) - Playbook says this is one of the best offerings. 3 free card rewards, gold, zero HP cost.
3. Curse + Transform 2 - Too risky with a starter deck. Could brick our early game.
4. Boss relic swap - Losing Pure Water (Miracle each combat) is a real cost. Random boss relic is a gamble.

CHOICE: Neow's Lament. Free fights let us build the deck safely and stay at full HP for early Act 1.

Cultist has 1 HP from Neow Lament. Strike kills it instantly. Save Miracle for later.
Grab Attack Potion, free potion slot
View card reward options

Card reward: Conclude (AOE attack that ends turn), Prostrate (0E, mantra+block), Flurry of Blows (0E attack, plays from discard on stance change).
Flurry of Blows rewards stance cycling which is the core Watcher engine. It is effectively free damage every time we switch stances. Best pickup here for building toward a stance-cycling deck.

Done with rewards, move to map
Done with rewards, move to map

ACT 1 PATHING - Boss: Hexaghost

BOSS PREP NEEDS:
- Weak source (MANDATORY for Inferno)
- Damage scaling (kill speed prevents Burns death spiral)
- Burns management (Watcher has no Evolve/Fire Breathing - need kill speed)
- HP above 70% entering boss

MAP ANALYSIS (from F1 Monster x=1):
F1: Monster(x=1) -> F2[1] = Monster(x=2)
F2: Monster(x=2) -> F3[1] = Monster(x=1)
F3: Monster(x=1) -> F4[2] = Unknown(x=2)
F4: Unknown(x=2) -> F5[1,2]:
  Option A: F5 Unknown(x=1) -> F6[1] = Rest(x=1) -> F7[0] = Unknown(x=1) -> F8[1] = Rest(x=0) -> F9[1,2] = Treasure(x=1) -> F10[1,2]:
    - F10 Elite(x=1) -> F11[0] = Unknown(x=0) -> F12[0] = Monster(x=0) -> F13[0,1] = Unknown/Shop -> F14[1,2] = Unknown/Monster -> F15 Rest
    - F10 Monster(x=2) -> F11[1] = Unknown(x=1) -> F12[0] = Monster(x=0) -> same
  Option B: F5 Monster(x=2) -> F6[3] = Rest(x=3) -> F7[2] = Elite(x=3) -> F8[2] = Rest(x=2) -> F9[2] = Treasure(x=2) -> F10[2]:
    Nope, F10 index 2 doesn't exist...

Let me re-read more carefully:
F4: Unknown(x=2) -> [1,2] meaning F5 indices 1 and 2
F5[1] = Unknown(x=1) -> F6[1] = Rest(x=1)
F5[2] = Monster(x=2) -> F6[3] = Rest(x=3)

ROUTE A (left-ish): F1M -> F2M -> F3M -> F4? -> F5? -> F6Rest -> F7? -> F8Rest -> F9Treasure -> F10Elite -> F11? -> F12M -> F13Shop -> F14M -> F15Rest -> BOSS
Monsters: 5+, Elites: 1, Rests: 3, Shop: 1, Treasure: 1

ROUTE B (center): F1M -> F2M -> F3M -> F4? -> F5M -> F6Rest -> F7Elite -> F8Rest -> F9Treasure -> F10M -> F11M -> F12M -> F13?/Shop -> F14M -> F15Rest -> BOSS
Monsters: 7+, Elites: 1, Rests: 3

Both routes hit ~3 rest sites which is great. Route A has rest before elite at F10, Route B has rest before elite at F7.

CHOSEN ROUTE: I'll aim left through the rests, hitting 1 elite with rest sites on either side. Neow Lament covers the first 2 remaining fights (F2 and F3) for free. After that I need a real deck.

DRAFT TARGETS for Hexaghost:
- Weak source: Wave of the Hand, Sash Whip (if they apply Weak?)
- Damage scaling: Wrath stance is built-in 2x damage
- Stance cycling cards: Eruption (Wrath), Vigilance (Calm), Empty Body, Empty Mind, etc.
- Key: Never end turn in Wrath without full block or guaranteed exit next turn

events.translated: Strike → Acid Slime (S) → Strike → Spike Slime (M) → End Turn
events.reasoning: Both slimes at 1 HP from Neow Lament. Strike each one to kill both. 2 energy spent, easy clear.

Spike Slime at 1 HP with Debuff intent. I have 2E left. No attacks in hand except Eruption (2E). I can play 2 Defends for 10 block and end turn - the Debuff does not do damage. Wait for attacks next turn.

events.translated: Flurry of Blows → Spike Slime (M) → End Turn
events.reasoning: Flurry of Blows is 0 energy to kill the 1 HP Spike Slime. Free card, save energy.
View card reward options
Battle Hymn is a power that adds a Smite (Retain attack) to hand each turn. Sustained damage engine for long fights like Hexaghost. Better than situational Bowling Bash or modest Prostrate.
Done with rewards, next floor
Only path available. Monster at x=0. Last Neow Lament charge - one more free fight.

events.command: play Flurry of Blows 0; play Strike 1; end
events.translated: Flurry of Blows → Louse → Strike → Louse → End Turn
events.reasoning: Both Louse at 1 HP. Flurry of Blows (0E) kills Louse 0, Strike (1E) kills Louse 1. Even with Curl Up 4, the damage exceeds 1 HP + 4 block. Flurry deals 4, Strike deals 6, both enough. Total cost: 1E.
Weak Potion is exactly what we need for Hexaghost Inferno turn. Save this for the boss.
View card reward options
Meditate is a core Watcher engine card. Lets you retain cards and manage stances. Essential for stance cycling which is the Watcher win condition.
Done with rewards, move to map
Only path available - Unknown room at x=0. First room without Neow Lament protection.
Waiting for shop inventory to load
Waiting for shop inventory to load
Waiting longer for shop inventory to load
Click center of screen to interact with shop
Press space to proceed into shop
Enter the shop

Shop evaluation with 145g:
- Card removal (75g): Always strong for deck thinning. Remove a Strike.
- Study (34g): Cheap. Adds Insight (free draw + retain) to draw pile. Decent for deck cycling.
- Lesson Learned (140g): Watcher rare that upgrades a card when you kill with it. Powerful long-term but expensive and I am not sure of exact effect.
- Centennial Puzzle (144g): Draw 3 on first HP loss. Conflicts with full block strategy.
- Strength Potion (52g): Helps with damage but temporary.

PLAN: Remove a Strike (75g) to thin the deck. This is the single highest-value purchase. Consider Study (34g) for cheap card draw. Total: 109g, leaves 36g.

Remove a Strike. Strikes are the weakest cards in the deck. Thinning helps find Eruption, Meditate, Battle Hymn more often.
Confirm Strike removal

Nothing else affordable. Leave shop.

Only path - Monster at x=0. First real fight. Full HP, should be fine with starter deck plus Flurry of Blows, Battle Hymn, Meditate, and Study.

events.summary: Enemies: Looter. Hand: Miracle, Defend, Eruption, Vigilance, Strike, Meditate

events.reasoning:
FIGHT STRATEGY - Looter (46 HP)

FIGHT TYPE: Hallway - full block every turn.
WIN CONDITION: Kill in 3-4 turns. Looter escapes after Smoke Bomb if not killed. Need ~15 damage/turn.
ZERO DAMAGE PLAN: 10 incoming Turn 1. Defend (5) + partial block from other sources. Need 10 block total.
KEY CARDS: Eruption (9 damage + enters Wrath for double damage next attack), Vigilance (enters Calm for energy), Meditate (stance management).
RELIC INTERACTIONS: Pure Water gives Miracle (0E, gain 1 energy, exhaust). Extra energy for damage.
POTION PLAN: Attack Potion if needed for kill speed. Save Weak Potion for boss.
RISKS: Looter escapes with gold. Taking damage from Mug.
ESTIMATED TURNS: 3-4.

TURN 1 PLAN:
Incoming: 10 damage
Hand: Miracle(0E), Defend(1E), Eruption(2E), Vigilance(2E), Strike(1E), Meditate(1E)
Path A: Eruption (9 dmg, enters Wrath) + Strike (6 dmg) = 15 damage. 3E spent. No block. Take 10 damage. BAD.
Path B: Defend (5 block) + Eruption (9 dmg, enters Wrath) + Miracle (1E) = 5 block, 9 damage, in Wrath. Take 5 damage. Still not zero.
Path C: Defend (5) + Vigilance (5 block, enters Calm) = 10 block. Miracle + Strike = 6 damage. Zero damage, but slow.
Path D: Defend (5) + Miracle + Eruption (9 dmg, enters Wrath) = 5 block, 9 damage. Take 5 damage in Wrath = 10 damage. WORSE.

Wait - in Wrath I take DOUBLE damage. So if I end turn in Wrath, 10 incoming becomes 20.
Path E: Defend (5) + Vigilance (enters Calm, 5 block) = 10 block vs 10 incoming = zero damage. 1E left. Use Meditate to set up next turn.
Actually Defend is 5 block, Vigilance is 5 block = 10 total vs 10 incoming. Zero damage. Use remaining 0E... wait I have 3E. Defend(1) + Vigilance(2) = 3E. Exactly 3E used. Zero damage taken, enter Calm stance.

CHOSEN: Path E. Defend + Vigilance for exact 10 block. Zero damage. Enter Calm (2E on exit next turn = 5E turn 2).

events.command: play Miracle; play Defend; play Defend; play Strike Looter; play Strike Looter; end
events.translated: Miracle → Defend → Defend → Strike → Looter → Strike → Looter → End Turn
events.reasoning: Miracle (+1E = 4E total). 2x Defend = 10 block vs 10 incoming = zero damage. 2x Strike = 12 damage to Looter. Full block + damage. Looter at 46, goes to 34.

events.command: play Defend; play Strike Looter; play Flurry of Blows Looter; end
events.translated: Defend → Strike → Looter → Flurry of Blows → Looter → End Turn
events.reasoning: Turn 3: 12 incoming. Cannot full block (only 5 from Defend). Defend(5 block) + Strike(6) + Flurry(0E, 4) = 10 damage. Take 7 damage (72->65). Looter at 24 HP. Must kill next turn to prevent escape. Save Battle Hymn/Study for later - they do not help defensively or offensively enough this turn.

events.command: play Eruption Looter; play Strike Looter; end
events.translated: Eruption → Looter → Strike → Looter → End Turn
events.reasoning: Looter is defending with Smoke Bomb (6 block). Will escape next turn! Must kill NOW. I am in Calm - playing Eruption exits Calm (+2E) and enters Wrath (2x damage). Eruption = 9 base, if Wrath doubles it = 18. Strike in Wrath = 12. Total: 30 damage vs 24 HP + 6 block = 30 effective HP. Should be exact kill. If Eruption does not get doubled, I have remaining energy for more plays.

events.command: play Flurry of Blows Looter; end
events.translated: Flurry of Blows → Looter → End Turn
events.reasoning: In Wrath stance. Flurry of Blows is 0E, deals 4 base * 2 (Wrath) = 8 damage. Looter at 15 HP. 8 < 15 so need more. Wait - let me use Strike instead for 12 damage. Still not enough. Strike (12) + Flurry (8) = 20 > 15. Kill!
ESCAPE intent! Must kill NOW. In Wrath stance, Eruption deals 9*2=18 damage. Looter has 7 HP + 6 block = 13 effective. 18 > 13. Kill confirmed.
View card reward options
Second Flurry of Blows doubles our free stance-change damage. Two 0-cost attacks every stance change is strong for our cycling engine. Better than situational Bowling Bash or expensive Sands of Time.
Move to next floor

FORCED ELITE at Floor 6! Only one path available.
HP: 65/72 (90%). Deck is mostly starter + Flurry of Blows x2, Battle Hymn, Meditate, Study.
Potions: Attack Potion, Weak Potion.

POTENTIAL ELITES:
- Gremlin Nob: Punishes skills (gains Str when you play skills). Play attacks aggressively.
- Lagavulin: Sleeps 3 turns, then debuffs. Race to kill before debuffs stack.
- Sentries: 3 enemies, daze cards. Most dangerous for a starter deck.

PLAN: Use potions aggressively if needed. This is do-or-die. The elite leads to Rest(x=1) at F7 which goes to Unknown then Rest again, so I can heal after.

events.text: PLAN — Combat: vs Sentry + Sentry + Sentry

events.summary: Enemies: Sentry, Sentry, Sentry. Hand: Miracle, Flurry of Blows, Defend, Vigilance, Defend, Defend

events.reasoning:
FIGHT STRATEGY - Sentries (3x Sentry, 38/42/39 HP)

FIGHT TYPE: Hallway (elite) - full block but this will be a long grind.
WIN CONDITION: Focus fire one Sentry at a time. Battle Hymn gives Smite each turn (sustained damage). Wrath stance doubles damage but doubles incoming. Need careful stance management.
ZERO DAMAGE PLAN: Turn 1 - only middle Sentry attacks for 9. Defend + Defend + Defend = 15 block vs 9. Easy zero.
KEY CARDS: Battle Hymn (sustained damage engine), Eruption (Wrath entry), Vigilance (Calm entry), Flurry of Blows x2 (free damage on stance change), Meditate (card management).
RELIC INTERACTIONS: Artifact 1 on each Sentry blocks first debuff (Weak Potion would be wasted on first use per sentry).
POTION PLAN: Attack Potion for burst damage to finish a Sentry. Weak Potion to reduce incoming on a double-attack turn (but Artifact blocks it for the first Sentry it hits).
RISKS: Dazed cards clogging hand. Long fight drains HP. No AOE.
ESTIMATED TURNS: 12-15+ without AOE.

TURN 1: 9 incoming from middle Sentry. Outer Sentries add Dazed (no damage).
Hand: Miracle(0E), Flurry(0E), Defend(1E), Vigilance(2E), Defend(1E), Defend(1E)
Path A: 3x Defend = 15 block vs 9 = zero damage. 0E for Miracle+Flurry.
Path B: Vigilance(2E) + Defend(1E) = 10 block vs 9 = zero damage. Enter Calm for +2E next turn.

I think Path B is better - entering Calm gives us 5E next turn for more plays. And we save 2 Defends for later turns.
Play Vigilance + Defend + Flurry on a Sentry (free damage). Use Miracle for extra energy? Not needed.

Actually: Vigilance(2E, 5 block, enter Calm) + Defend(1E, 5 block) = 10 block vs 9. Zero damage. Flurry(0E, 4 damage to Sentry). Miracle saved for energy later. 

Focus fire: which Sentry to target? Kill an outer Sentry first - they Bolt on turn 1, then Beam on turn 2. If I kill one before its Beam, I reduce incoming. Target the one with lowest HP - Sentry 0 (38 HP).

events.command: play Vigilance; play Defend; play Flurry of Blows 0; end
events.translated: Vigilance → Defend → Flurry of Blows → Sentry → End Turn
events.reasoning: Turn 1: 9 incoming from middle Sentry only. Vigilance (5 block, enter Calm) + Defend (5 block) = 10 block vs 9 = zero damage. Flurry of Blows (0E, 4 damage) on Sentry 0 (38 HP) for free. Enter Calm for +2E next turn.
Eruption on Sentry 0 for 9 damage. Exit Calm (+2E) and enter Wrath. This will trigger any Flurry of Blows in discard. Need to see state before continuing.
MUST EXIT WRATH! In Wrath, incoming is doubled (36 total). Meditate enters Calm, exits Wrath. Also retrieves a card from discard. This stance change may trigger Flurry from discard too.
Retrieve Defend from discard to help block the 18 incoming damage.

events.command: play Battle Hymn; play Miracle; play Defend; play Strike 0; play Strike 0; play Flurry of Blows 0; end
events.translated: Battle Hymn → Miracle → Defend → Strike → Sentry → Strike → Sentry → Flurry of Blows → Sentry → End Turn
events.reasoning: Turn 3: 9 incoming from Sentry 1 only. Cannot full block (only 1 Defend = 5 block, take 4). Setup Battle Hymn now (power, 1E) for Smite generation every turn. Miracle(+1E) + Defend(5 block) + 2x Strike(12 damage) + Flurry(4 damage) = 16 damage to Sentry 0 (25 HP -> 9 HP). Nearly kills it.

Kill Sentry 0 (9 HP) with Smite (12 damage, exhaust). This removes one damage source permanently. Defend (5 block) vs remaining 9 from Sentry 2 = take 4 damage. Cannot avoid all damage with Dazed-clogged hand (3 unplayable cards).

events.command: play Defend; play Defend; play Smite 1; end
events.translated: Defend → Defend → Smite → Sentry → End Turn
events.reasoning: Turn 5: 9 incoming from Sentry 1 only. 2x Defend = 10 block vs 9 = zero damage. Smite on Sentry 1 for 12 damage (42->30). Full block achieved.

events.command: play Smite 1; play Strike 1; play Flurry of Blows 1; end
events.translated: Smite → Sentry → Strike → Sentry → Flurry of Blows → Sentry → End Turn
events.reasoning: Turn 6: 9 incoming from Sentry 2. No block cards in hand (3 Dazed clogging). Must take 9 damage. Maximize damage on Sentry 1: Smite(12) + Strike(6) + Flurry(4) = 22 damage. Sentry 1: 30->8.

events.command: play Smite 1; play Strike 2; play Vigilance; end
events.translated: Smite → Sentry → Strike → Sentry → Vigilance → End Turn
events.reasoning: Kill Sentry 1 (8 HP) with Smite (12 damage). Removes 9 incoming. Strike on Sentry 2 (6 damage, 39->33). Vigilance (enter Calm, 5 block as safety) with remaining energy. Zero damage this turn since Sentry 2 is debuffing. Enter Calm for +2E next turn.
1E remaining. Meditate enters Calm (+2E next turn) and lets me retrieve a card from discard. Good setup for next turn.
Retrieve Strike from discard. Need damage to kill Sentry 2. Will retain it for next turn.

events.command: play Defend; play Defend; play Smite 2; end
events.translated: Defend → Defend → Smite → Sentry → End Turn
events.reasoning: Turn 8: 9 incoming from Sentry 2. 2x Defend = 10 block vs 9 = zero damage. Smite on Sentry 2 for 12 damage (33->21). Full block priority - we are at 30 HP, cannot afford more chip damage.

events.command: play Smite 2; play Flurry of Blows 2; end
events.translated: Smite → Sentry → Flurry of Blows → Sentry → End Turn
events.reasoning: Turn 9: Sentry 2 debuffing (0 damage). All-in on damage. Smite(12) + Flurry(4) = 16 damage. Sentry 2: 21->5 HP. Nearly dead. Block not needed this turn.
Kill last Sentry (5 HP) with Smite (12 damage). Fight over! Took 26 total damage (72->30 at 41% HP after Sentries with near-starter deck, plus Dazed clogging).
Kunai is excellent! +1 Dex per 3 attacks played in a turn. With 2x Flurry of Blows (0-cost attacks) and Smite from Battle Hymn, we can hit 3 attacks per turn fairly often. Great defensive scaling.
View card reward options from elite

Follow-Up synergizes with Kunai - cheap attack that refunds energy when chained after another attack. Helps hit 3 attacks/turn for Kunai Dex triggers. Also adds damage output which we need for Hexaghost.
Done with rewards. Move to map.
Only path - Unknown at x=1. Leads to Rest on F8 which we desperately need at 30/72 HP.

events.text: PLAN — Combat: vs Fungi Beast + Fungi Beast

events.summary: Combat: vs Fungi Beast + Fungi Beast
Enemies: Fungi Beast, Fungi Beast. Hand: Miracle, Defend, Strike, Flurry of Blows, Flurry of Blows, Strike

events.reasoning:
FIGHT STRATEGY - 2x Fungi Beast (23/26 HP)

FIGHT TYPE: Hallway - full block. At 30 HP, cannot afford much damage.
WIN CONDITION: Kill both before Str scaling gets dangerous. Focus fire one at a time.
ZERO DAMAGE PLAN: Need to identify intents. Unknown amounts. Play safe with at least 1 Defend.
KEY CARDS: Flurry of Blows (free damage + Kunai stacks), Follow-Up (chain attacks), Eruption (Wrath burst)
RELIC INTERACTIONS: Kunai triggers on 3 attacks/turn. With 2x Flurry and other attacks, should trigger.
POTION PLAN: Save potions for boss.
RISKS: Spore Cloud Vulnerable on kill + other beast attacking. Str scaling if fight goes long.
ESTIMATED TURNS: 3-4.

TURN 1: Focus fire Fungi 0 (lower HP 23). Strike + Strike + Flurry + Flurry = 2E + 0E + 0E = 2E for 12+8=20 damage. Defend for 1E. Total 3E. 20 damage (23->3), 5 block.

events.command: play Strike 0; play Strike 0; play Flurry of Blows 0; play Flurry of Blows 0; play Defend; end
events.translated: Strike → Fungi Beast → Strike → Fungi Beast → Flurry of Blows → Fungi Beast → Flurry of Blows → Fungi Beast → Defend → End Turn
events.reasoning: Turn 1: Focus fire Fungi 0 (23 HP). 2x Strike (12) + 2x Flurry (8) = 20 damage on Fungi 0. 4 attacks = Kunai triggers once (+1 Dex). Defend for 5+1=6 block. Leaves Fungi 0 at 3 HP.

events.command: play Defend; play Defend; play Defend; end
events.reasoning: Turn 2: 18 incoming (9+9 from both Fungi). 3x Defend = 18 block (6 each with Dex 1) vs 18 incoming = ZERO DAMAGE. Cannot afford Eruption (enters Wrath, doubles incoming to 18 from remaining beast). Full block this turn, kill Fungi 0 next turn.
Kill Fungi 0 (3 HP) with Strike (6 damage). Removes one attacker. Spore Cloud will give me 2 Vulnerable though.
Follow-Up on Fungi 1 for damage. Last card was Strike (attack), so Follow-Up refunds 1 energy. Kunai count at 1, this makes 2.
Vigilance for 6 block (5+1 Dex) and enter Calm. 6 block vs 13 incoming = take 7 damage (30->23). Enter Calm for +2E next turn. Cannot do better with current hand.
Free turn (Fungi buffing, no damage). Exit Calm (+2E) and enter Wrath. Eruption deals 9 to Fungi 1 (19->10). Then Strike in Wrath for 12 = kill.
Strike in Wrath deals 12 damage (6*2). Fungi 1 at 10 HP. 12 > 10. Kill confirmed. Fight over.
Skill Potion gives a random skill card. Useful to have for emergencies. Fills our last potion slot.
View card reward
Judgment is a rare skill that instant-kills enemies below a HP threshold (30, or 40 upgraded). Incredible finisher card. Best pick here by far.
Move to next floor. Need rest site desperately at 26 HP.
Rest site at x=0. At 36% HP, must rest to survive upcoming fights.
At 26/72 HP (36%). Must rest to survive. Heals ~21 to 47 HP (65%). Cannot risk upgrading at this HP level.
Done resting, move to map
Treasure room - free relic! No combat needed.
Collect 26 gold
Potion Belt gives 2 extra potion slots (3->5). More potion capacity is always useful. Take the relic over the Sapphire Key since we dont need the key at A0.
Done with treasure, move to map

Monster path at x=2. At 47/72 HP (65%), another elite is too risky after the Sentries nearly killed us. Both paths converge at F12, so the only difference is this floor. Take the safe monster fight for a card reward.

FIGHT TYPE: Hallway - full block.
WIN CONDITION: Damage to 30 HP or below, then Judgment kills instantly. Avoid triggering split.

Block first. Defend gives 4 block (Frail reduces 6 to 4). 4 vs 16 incoming = take 12. Not great but no other option.
6 damage to slime (40->34). 1E remaining for Meditate to retrieve Judgment.
Meditate to retrieve Judgment from discard and retain it. Judgment retained means I can use it next turn to instant-kill slime once I get it to 30 HP.
Retrieve Judgment from discard. Will retain it for next turn to instant-kill slime at 30 HP.

events.translated: Follow-Up → Spike Slime (L) → Judgment → Spike Slime (L) → End Turn
events.reasoning: Free turn (slime debuffing). Follow-Up deals 7 damage (34->27). Judgment kills enemies at 30 HP or below. 27 < 30 = instant kill! Fight over in 2E.
Speed Potion gives Dexterity for one turn. Useful for big attack turns. Have open potion slots.
View card reward

Carve Reality - 1E attack that also adds a Smite to hand. Two attacks from one card, synergizes with Kunai. Adds damage output which we need for Hexaghost. Better than Halt (free but small block) or duplicate Battle Hymn.
Done with rewards, move to map
Only path - Unknown room. Could be event, shop, or combat.

events.translated: [Pray] Remove a card from your deck.
events.reasoning: Free card removal! Remove a Strike to thin the deck.
Remove a Strike. Down to 2 Strikes. Deck thins to draw better cards more often.
Confirm Strike removal
Leave the shrine, Strike removed.
Only path - Monster at x=0. Leads to F13 where I can choose between Unknown and Shop. Want shop for card removal before boss.

FIGHT TYPE: Hallway - full block. Many enemies, all low HP.

POTION PLAN: Save for boss.
RISKS: Overwhelmed by multiple attackers.
ESTIMATED TURNS: 3-4.

Turn 1: Carve Reality on a slime (kills a small one + gives Smite) + Defend x2 for block. Use Miracle if needed.

events.reasoning: Kill Spike Slime 3 (1 HP) with Strike. Judgment instant-kills Spike Slime 4 (14 HP < 30). Removes 10 incoming (5+5). Defend (6 block with Dex 1) vs remaining 5 (Slime 2) = 1 block surplus. ZERO DAMAGE. Kill 2 enemies this turn.
Defend first for 6 block (5+1 Dex). 6 vs 8 incoming. Then focus on killing slimes.
Carve Reality on Spike Slime 2 (13 HP). Deals ~4-6 damage with Weak. Also adds Smite to hand.

events.translated: Follow-Up → Spike Slime (S) → Strike → Spike Slime (S) → End Turn
events.reasoning: Follow-Up on Spike Slime 2 (9 HP). ~5 damage with Weak (9->4). Refunds 1E (last card was Carve, an attack). Strike (1E, 4 damage with Weak) kills Spike Slime 2 (4->0). 3 attacks this turn triggers Kunai (+1 Dex). Only Acid Slime left (3 damage). 6 block vs 3 = zero damage.
Judgment instant-kills Acid Slime (12 HP < 30 threshold). Fight over. Dex 2 from Kunai will help in future fights.
View card reward

Crescendo - 1E enter Wrath, Retain. Cheap retained Wrath entry completes the stance cycle engine. Currently only Eruption (2E) enters Wrath. Crescendo at 1E is a huge energy savings and retaining means it is always available when needed.
Move to map. Need to get to the rest site before the boss at 21 HP.
Shop at F13. Safe room, can buy/remove cards. Leads to Unknown -> Rest -> Boss. At 21 HP need safe rooms before boss.
Enter shop to see inventory
Remove another Strike for 100g. Deck thinning is the highest value purchase. Down to 1 Strike after this.
Remove a Strike. Down to 1 Strike in deck.
Confirm Strike removal
Just Lucky is a 0E card that I think gives block, damage, and Scry. Free value every turn. Better than Tranquility since I already have Calm entry options. At 50g, leaves 4g.
No gold left, leave shop
Leave shop room
Only path - Unknown at x=1. Leads to Rest at F15 before boss. Hoping for event not combat at 21 HP.
Collect 25 gold
Meal Ticket heals 15 HP at shops. Good for Act 2 healing. Take relic over Sapphire Key since we dont need the key at A0.
Done with rewards. Rest site next, then boss.
Rest site before boss. At 21/72 HP, must rest to have any chance against Hexaghost.
At 21/72 HP (29%). Must rest before Hexaghost. Heals to ~42 HP (58%). Below recommended 70% but no choice.
Move to boss fight
Boss fight - Hexaghost. Time to fight.

events.summary: Enemies: Hexaghost. Hand: Miracle, Defend, Flurry of Blows, Crescendo, Judgment, Flurry of Blows

events.reasoning:
FIGHT STRATEGY - Hexaghost (250 HP)

FIGHT TYPE: Boss - can spend HP more freely but Burns create a death spiral.
WIN CONDITION: Kill before Burns overwhelm. Stance cycling for damage. Battle Hymn for sustained Smite generation.
ZERO DAMAGE PLAN: Turn 1 free (Activate). Turn 2 Divider = 42 damage multi-hit. Need maximum block.
KEY CARDS: Battle Hymn (Smite engine), Crescendo (cheap Wrath entry), Meditate/Vigilance (Calm exit), Judgment (finisher at 30 HP), Weak Potion (SAVE for Inferno).
RELIC INTERACTIONS: Kunai (+1 Dex per 3 attacks) will compound over long fight. Flurry of Blows auto-play on stance changes.
POTION PLAN: Weak Potion for Inferno turn (reduces 42 to ~28). Attack Potion, Speed Potion for burst. Skill Potion could give useful card.

HEXAGHOST PATTERN:
T1: Activate (0 damage) - FREE SETUP
T2: Divider (42 damage multi-hit) - MUST BLOCK
T3: Sear (6 + Burn)
T4: Tackle (10)
T5: Sear (6 + Burn)
T6: Inflame (0 damage, +12 block +2 Str)
T7: Tackle (10 + Str)
T8: Sear (6 + Burn + Str)
T9: Inferno (12 + 3 Burns) - USE WEAK POTION

TURN 1 PLAN:
Free turn. Set up Battle Hymn (1E). Play Crescendo (1E, enter Wrath, exhaust). Play attacks in Wrath for double damage. Need to exit Wrath before turn 2.

Hand: Miracle(0E), Defend(1E), 2x Flurry(0E), Crescendo(1E, exhaust), Judgment(1E).
- Battle Hymn is in draw pile, not hand. Cannot set up this turn.
- Crescendo (1E, enter Wrath). 2x Flurry (0E each, 8 total in Wrath). Judgment (1E on Hexaghost... won't work, 250 > 30). Defend for safety?
- No exit from Wrath available! If I Crescendo into Wrath, I have no way out. Meditate and Vigilance are in draw pile.

Better: Just play Flurry x2 for 8 damage, save Crescendo for when I have an exit. Defend for safety.

Actually Turn 1 is free (0 damage). I can enter Wrath safely - next turn I draw new cards and hopefully get Vigilance or Meditate to exit.

Plan: Crescendo (1E, Wrath) + Miracle (+1E) + Flurry + Flurry (0E, 8 each in Wrath = 16) + Defend (1E, 5 block, wasted but safety). 3 attacks for Kunai!

Wait - 2 Flurries = 2 attacks. Crescendo is a skill. 2 attacks total, Kunai needs 3.
Hmm. Just play Crescendo + 2x Flurry = 16 damage + enter Wrath. Keep Miracle and Defend for turn 2.

Save Miracle and Defend for Turn 2 Divider (42 damage). In Wrath for Turn 2 - DANGEROUS, will take double Divider. Need to find Wrath exit immediately next turn.
Use Speed Potion for +5 Dex this turn. With 3 Defends, this gives 30 block instead of 15. Saves 15 HP against the 48-damage Divider.

Confirm Scry selection - keep cards on top of draw pile as is.

Exit Wrath, enter Calm. Sear damage drops from 12 to 6. Retrieve Defend from discard for blocking. 1E remaining for Defend.

Smite for 12 damage to Hexaghost. 186->174.
Second Smite for 12 more damage. 174->162. Kunai at 2, one more attack triggers +1 Dex.
Free 4 damage. 3rd attack triggers Kunai +1 Dex.
Free 3 damage + Scry + block. Every bit of damage counts against 250 HP boss.
Scry - discard the Burn card to avoid hand clogging. Burns are the Hexaghost death spiral.
Confirm Scry selection, proceed to end turn.
End turn. 10 block vs 6 Sear = zero damage. Good damage dealt this turn (~31 total). Burn discarded via Scry.
Free turn (Hexaghost buffing). Smite for 12 damage. 155->143.
Carve Reality for 6 damage (143->137) + adds Smite to hand. Attack chain for Kunai.
Follow-Up for 7 damage. Refunds 1E (Carve was an attack). 137->130. Kunai at 3 = +1 Dex!
Smite for 12 damage. 130->118.
Free 3 damage + Scry. 118->115. Every point matters.
Confirm Scry. End turn - free buff turn for Hexaghost, no damage to me.
End turn. Hexaghost at 115/250 (46%). Dealt 40 damage this turn on free turn. Dex 3 from Kunai makes blocking easier.

events.command: play Defend; play Smite 0; play Flurry of Blows 0; end
events.translated: Defend → Smite → Hexaghost → Flurry of Blows → Hexaghost → End Turn
events.reasoning: Turn 7: Tackle 14 incoming. Defend (8 block with Dex 3) vs 14 = take 6 (20->14). Smite (12 damage, breaks Hexaghost 12 block). Flurry (0E, 4 HP damage to Hexaghost). 3 attacks for Kunai if... only 2 attacks (Smite + Flurry). Need to accept 6 damage.

INFERNO TURN! Apply Weak to Hexaghost. Reduces 4x6=24 to 3x6=18. Critical for survival at 14 HP.
Defend = 8 block (5+3 Dex). Start blocking against 18 Inferno.
